name: crystal-loader
help: Run a Crystal Palace PICO-wrapped post-ex DLL inside a Sliver implant

arguments.name: payload
arguments.desc: Path on operator host to a Crystal Palace PICO .bin produced by generate.sh — Sliver client reads it and forwards bytes to the implant

arguments.name: args
arguments.desc: Optional command/args string passed to the post-ex DLL at runtime as lpReserved — overrides any args baked into the PICO at link time
